pages.text: $(bold)The survival loop$()$(br)$(li)Find $(item)Fiber Reed Seeds$() in grass.$(br)$(li)Mine silicon and rare earth.$(br)$(li)Build the four machines.$(br)$(li)Breed better seeds, then bottle serums.

pages.title: First Production Chain
pages.text: $(bold)Recommended order$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Atmospheric Condenser$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Bio Incubator$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Gene Splicer$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Serum Bottler$()$(br2)$(bold)Core loop$()$(br)Glass bottles → purified water → incubation resources → synaptic berries → serum.
